content.situation: 你因孩子突然发烧需要在家照顾，向主管申请半天假。
content.speakerText: I need to take a half-day off today because my child is sick and needs care at home.
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天需要请半天假，因为我的孩子生病了，需要在家照顾。
content.responseTemplate: I understand. Please take care of your child — ___.

blanks.answer: let me know if you need more time
options: let me know if you need more time
I hope you feel better soon
can you come in tomorrow early

content.hint: 表达理解后，应提供支持性回应，暗示可灵活处理后续安排
content.knowledgePoint: 表达同理心并展现支持态度

content.situation: 你因牙医预约冲突，需提前一小时下班，向同事说明情况。
content.speakerText: I have a dental appointment this afternoon and need to leave an hour early.
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天下午有个牙医预约，需要提前一小时下班。
content.responseTemplate: That's totally fine. ___ so the team can adjust the schedule.

blanks.answer: I'll make sure my tasks are covered
options: I'll make sure my tasks are covered
it's not a big deal anyway

content.hint: 说明原因后，应主动承担安排责任，体现职业态度
content.knowledgePoint: 主动承担责任以体现专业性

content.situation: 你因家中水管破裂需要紧急处理，向项目经理申请临时缺勤。
content.speakerText: There's a sudden water leak at home and I need to be there to manage the repair.
content.speakerTextCn: 家里突然漏水了，我需要在家处理维修事宜。
content.responseTemplate: I'm sorry to hear that. ___ — just keep me updated.

options: Don't forget to call the landlord

content.hint: 面对突发家庭状况，应优先表达关心，鼓励对方处理紧急事务
content.knowledgePoint: 优先关心对方需求而非工作安排
